Epithelial Cells in Urine

Epithelial Cells in Urine 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is an epithelial cells in urine test? 
Epithelial cells cover the inside and outside of the surfaces of your body. They are found on your skin, blood vessels, and organs, including your urinary tract (which includes your kidneys, ureters, bladder, and urethra).
An epithelial cells in urine test looks at a sample of your urine (pee) under a micro
